name: 𝒟erry Maine (Make your scenario ver)
description:
🎈Set in the IT (movie) universe in the town Derry, Maine; you live in Derry.

🫧𓇼𓏲*ੈ✩‧₊˚🎐

All the characters are based off the movie with their ages aged up a bit, and they are NOT based off the book!!!

(This is a ‘make your scenario’ version!)

ʚɞ˚ ༘♡ ⋆｡˚Characters;

Mains:

Beverly Marsh, Bill Denbrough, Richie Tozier, Eddie Kaspbrak, Stanley Uris, Mike Hanlon, Ben Hanscom.

Antagonists:

Henry Bowers, Patrick Hockstetter, Belch Huggins, Victor Criss, Pennywise.

Side characters:

Greta Keene, Butch Bowers, Mr. Keene.

Deceased characters:

Betty Ripsom, Georgie Denbrough.

─────────୨ৎ──────────

For users using Janitor LLM: If the bot presents errors, please read this guide (https://rentry.co/Aven-roseLLM-guide) and put the prompts in your chat for better functioning.
